elections.note: Pre-adoption midterm anchor (pre-VCA all-mail, pre-e-pollbook). Total ballots cast 164,453 per the county elections office as quoted by the Almanac (almanacnews.com 2018-11-14). NOTE: this denominator is the registrar-reported figure, not the CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics PDF, which returned HTTP 403 in this environment for 2014. No 8pm first-report ballot count sourceable (Wayback blocked; live results overwritten).

Certified final 323,303 from CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics (Total Voters column; primary). Pre-VCA equipment: of the 323,303 ballots, 210,661 (65%) vote-by-mail, 105,014 (32%) cast at polls, 7,628 early at voting centers. 8pm first-report ballot count not sourceable (Wayback blocked; county live results page overwritten).

Adoption/transition year: first general after San Mateo became a Voter's Choice Act all-mail / vote-center county with electronic pollbooks AND a new voting system (first VCA election was the June 2018 primary). Election night was notably SLOW: the ~8pm first report (pre-Election-Day VBM only) was 'so low that key races were undetermined' and the count was 'clearly incomplete at the close of election night well after midnight' (Almanac, 2018-11-14). No first-report ballot count published; value left null. Certified final 290,058 from CA SoS (primary).

PROXY, not a measured first-report count. The Chief Elections Officer stated she expected ~60% of all votes cast to be counted by 8pm on election night (first report) -> ~228k of the 380,193 certified; exact 8:10pm first-tranche total not published. Record COVID-era early returns: by the next morning (Wed Nov 4) a running total of 343,594 ballots (~90.4% of the 380,193 certified) had been counted (smdailyjournal 'election results update', article_fb902f9e). Certified final 380,193 from CA SoS (primary). VBM ~90% of vote.

First report posted 8:10pm and included VBM received on/before Fri Nov 4 (smcacre Overview of Results Reporting). No election-night ballot count sourceable (Wayback blocked; live results overwritten); value left null. Certified final 252,233 from CA SoS (primary). VBM 92.9% of final ballots.

8pm first-report count not sourceable (Wayback blocked; live results overwritten); value left null. Context only (NOT the first tranche): a running semiofficial total two days later, as of Nov 7, was 221,877 ballots / 50.1% reported turnout = ~65.8% of the 337,241 certified, so the 8pm first report was lower than this. Certified final 337,241 from CA SoS (primary): 297,775 VBM (88%) + 39,466 vote-center (12%).
